title: Block Damage Fusion
description: Block Damage Fusion enhances Minecraft’s block-breaking overlay with cleaner, smoother visuals
body:
## 📦 Block Damage Fusion
**Block Damage Fusion** is a Java Edition resource pack that updates Minecraft’s block-breaking animations while keeping the original style intact.

This pack replaces the default overlay with smooth, **pixel-perfect damage stages,** providing clearer and more immersive visual feedback when breaking blocks. The subtle enhancements make every block interaction feel polished without altering the core Minecraft experience.

✅ **Recommended for players who:**

- Want more **immersive** and **visually satisfying** block-breaking effects

💬 If you want to **share feedback** or **ideas** about the project, please leave a comment on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/block-damage-fusion/comments)

Inspired by **Actions & Stuff**
